form.label: CopyCat - Configurazione
form.description: Scegli tipi di log e volume obiettivo. L'app calcola automaticamente ogni quanti secondi generare i log.

search.query: | makeresults | eval selected=split(trim("$form.log_types$"), ",") | eval max_mb=tonumber("$form.max_mb_per_day$") | eval max_mb=if(isnull(max_mb) OR max_mb<=0, null(), max_mb) | eval n_app=if(mvfind(selected, "app")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_security=if(mvfind(selected, "security")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_network=if(mvfind(selected, "network")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_docker=if(mvfind(selected, "docker")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_database=if(mvfind(selected, "database")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_webserver=if(mvfind(selected, "webserver")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_system=if(mvfind(selected, "system")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_api=if(mvfind(selected, "api")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_error=if(mvfind(selected, "error")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_metrics=if(mvfind(selected, "metrics")>=0, 1, 0) | eval selected_types=n_app+n_security+n_network+n_docker+n_database+n_webserver+n_system+n_api+n_error+n_metrics | eval bytes_per_cycle=(n_app*130)+(n_security*95)+(n_network*105)+(n_docker*100)+(n_database*140)+(n_webserver*115)+(n_system*100)+(n_api*120)+(n_error*150)+(n_metrics*90) | eval raw_interval_sec=if(isnull(max_mb), 10, ceil((bytes_per_cycle*86400)/(max_mb*1024*1024))) | eval applied_interval_sec=if(raw_interval_sec<10, 10, raw_interval_sec) | eval estimated_mb_day=round((bytes_per_cycle*86400/applied_interval_sec)/1024/1024, 3) | eval events_per_day=round((selected_types*86400)/applied_interval_sec, 2) | eval note=if(isnull(max_mb), "Nessun volume impostato: default 10s", "Intervallo calcolato da volume target") | table selected_types bytes_per_cycle applied_interval_sec estimated_mb_day events_per_day note | rename selected_types AS "Tipi selezionati" bytes_per_cycle AS "Byte per ciclo stimati" applied_interval_sec AS "Intervallo applicato (sec)" estimated_mb_day AS "MB/giorno stimati" events_per_day AS "Eventi/giorno stimati" note AS "Nota"

| makeresults | eval updated_at=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z") | eval copycat_log_types=trim("$form.log_types$") | eval limit_raw=trim("$form.max_mb_per_day$") | eval limit_num=tonumber(limit_raw) | eval copycat_max_ingest_mb_day=if(limit_raw="" OR isnull(limit_num) OR limit_num<=0, "", tostring(round(limit_num, 3))) | table updated_at copycat_log_types copycat_max_ingest_mb_day | outputlookup copycat_env | eval status="Configurazione salvata" | table status updated_at copycat_log_types copycat_max_ingest_mb_day | rename status AS "Esito" updated_at AS "Aggiornato il" copycat_log_types AS "COPYCAT_LOG_TYPES" copycat_max_ingest_mb_day AS "COPYCAT_MAX_INGEST_MB_DAY"

| inputlookup copycat_env | eval selected=split(copycat_log_types, ",") | eval max_mb=tonumber(copycat_max_ingest_mb_day) | eval max_mb=if(isnull(max_mb) OR max_mb<=0, null(), max_mb) | eval n_app=if(mvfind(selected, "app")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_security=if(mvfind(selected, "security")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_network=if(mvfind(selected, "network")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_docker=if(mvfind(selected, "docker")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_database=if(mvfind(selected, "database")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_webserver=if(mvfind(selected, "webserver")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_system=if(mvfind(selected, "system")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_api=if(mvfind(selected, "api")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_error=if(mvfind(selected, "error")>=0, 1, 0) | eval n_metrics=if(mvfind(selected, "metrics")>=0, 1, 0) | eval selected_types=n_app+n_security+n_network+n_docker+n_database+n_webserver+n_system+n_api+n_error+n_metrics | eval bytes_per_cycle=(n_app*130)+(n_security*95)+(n_network*105)+(n_docker*100)+(n_database*140)+(n_webserver*115)+(n_system*100)+(n_api*120)+(n_error*150)+(n_metrics*90) | eval raw_interval_sec=if(isnull(max_mb), 10, ceil((bytes_per_cycle*86400)/(max_mb*1024*1024))) | eval applied_interval_sec=if(raw_interval_sec<10, 10, raw_interval_sec) | eval estimated_mb_day=round((bytes_per_cycle*86400/applied_interval_sec)/1024/1024, 3) | table updated_at copycat_log_types copycat_max_ingest_mb_day applied_interval_sec estimated_mb_day | rename updated_at AS "Aggiornato il" copycat_log_types AS "COPYCAT_LOG_TYPES" copycat_max_ingest_mb_day AS "COPYCAT_MAX_INGEST_MB_DAY" applied_interval_sec AS "Intervallo applicato (sec)" estimated_mb_day AS "MB/giorno stimati"
